captcha.title: Human Verification
captcha.description: Complete the captcha challenge so we know you're not a bot.
captcha.errorOnSignIn: Please complete the captcha challenge before signing in.
captcha.errorOnSignUp: Please complete the captcha challenge before signing up.

login.title: Sign in to your account
login.subtitle: Join thousands of business that use OneUptime to help them stay online all the time.

twoFactor.title: Two Factor Authentication
twoFactor.subtitle: Select two factor authentication method. You will be asked to enter a code from the selected method.
twoFactor.securityKeyInstructions: Please follow the instructions on your security key device.
twoFactor.codeFieldDescription: Enter the code from your authenticator app
twoFactor.selectDifferentMethod: Select a different two factor authentication method

register.title: Create your OneUptime account
register.subtitle: Join thousands of business that use OneUptime to help them stay online all the time.
register.notifySelfHosted: Notify me about security patches and new releases

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Please enter your email and the password reset link will be sent to you.
forgotPassword.successMessage: We have emailed you the password reset link. Please do not forget to check spam.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.subtitle: Please enter your new password and we will have it updated.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been updated. Please log in.

sso.title: Login with SSO
sso.subtitle: Login with your SSO provider to access your account.
sso.selectProjectSubtitle: Select the project you want to login to.
sso.noConfigForEmail: No SSO configuration found for the email: {{email}}
sso.emailRequired: Email is required to perform this action

verifyEmail.successDescription: Thank you for verifying your email. You can now log in to OneUptime.

forbidden.title: Forbidden
forbidden.description: You do not have permission to access this page.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: Page you are looking for does not exist.
